description: TypeScript and JavaScript linter and ESLint compatible config for correctness and some stylistic rules

option.name: --allow
tip: U: -A, --allow <NAME>
Allow the rule or category (suppress the lint)

option.name: --config
tip: U: -c, --config <PATH>
Oxlint configuration file (.json and .jsonc supported in all runtimes)

option.name: --debug
tip: U: --debug <OPTIONS>
Enable debug output options. Options are comma-separated.

next.name: files
tip: Print the list of files that will be linted, then exit

next.name: timings
tip: Enable per-rule timing information

option.name: --deny
tip: U: -D, --deny <NAME>
Deny the rule or category (emit an error)

option.name: --deny-warnings
tip: Ensure warnings produce a non-zero exit code

option.name: --disable-nested-config
tip: Disable the automatic loading of nested configuration files

option.name: --disable-oxc-plugin
tip: Disable oxc unique rules, which is turned on by default

option.name: --disable-typescript-plugin
tip: Disable TypeScript plugin, which is turned on by default

option.name: --disable-unicorn-plugin
tip: Disable unicorn plugin, which is turned on by default

option.name: --fix
tip: Fix as many issues as possible. Only unfixed issues are reported in the output.

option.name: --fix-dangerously
tip: Apply dangerous fixes and suggestions

option.name: --fix-suggestions
tip: Apply auto-fixable suggestions. May change program behavior.

option.name: --format
tip: U: -f, --format <ARG>
Use a specific output format

next.name: agent
tip: Agent format

next.name: checkstyle
tip: Checkstyle format

next.name: default
tip: Default format

next.name: github
tip: GitHub format

next.name: gitlab
tip: GitLab format

next.name: json
tip: JSON format

next.name: junit
tip: JUnit format

next.name: sarif
tip: SARIF format

next.name: stylish
tip: Stylish format

next.name: unix
tip: Unix format

option.name: --ignore-path
tip: U: --ignore-path <PATH>
Specify the file to use as your .eslintignore

option.name: --ignore-pattern
tip: U: --ignore-pattern <PAT>
Specify patterns of files to ignore (in addition to those in .eslintignore)

option.name: --import-plugin
tip: Enable import plugin and detect ESM problems

option.name: --init
tip: Initialize oxlint configuration with default values

option.name: --jest-plugin
tip: Enable the Jest plugin and detect test problems

option.name: --jsdoc-plugin
tip: Enable jsdoc plugin and detect JSDoc problems

option.name: --jsx-a11y-plugin
tip: Enable the JSX-a11y plugin and detect accessibility problems

option.name: --lsp
tip: Start the language server

option.name: --max-warnings
tip: U: --max-warnings <INT>
Specify a warning threshold, which can be used to force exit with an error status if there are too many warning-level rule violations

option.name: --nextjs-plugin
tip: Enable the Next.js plugin and detect Next.js problems

option.name: --no-ignore
tip: Disable excluding files from .eslintignore files, --ignore-path flags and --ignore-pattern flags

option.name: --node-plugin
tip: Enable the node plugin and detect node usage problems

option.name: --print-config
tip: Output the configuration to be used. When present, no linting is performed and only config-related options are valid.

option.name: --promise-plugin
tip: Enable the promise plugin and detect promise usage problems

option.name: --quiet
tip: Disable reporting on warnings, only errors are reported

option.name: --react-perf-plugin
tip: Enable the React performance plugin and detect rendering performance problems

option.name: --react-plugin
tip: Enable react plugin, which is turned off by default

option.name: --report-unused-disable-directives
tip: Report directive comments like // oxlint-disable-line, when no errors would have been reported on that line anyway

option.name: --report-unused-disable-directives-severity
tip: U: --report-unused-disable-directives-severity <SEVERITY>
Same as --report-unused-disable-directives, but allows you to specify the severity level

option.name: --rules
tip: List all the rules that are currently registered

option.name: --silent
tip: Do not display any diagnostics

option.name: --threads
tip: U: --threads <INT>
Number of threads to use. Set to 1 for using only 1 CPU core.

option.name: --tsconfig
tip: U: --tsconfig <PATH>
Override the TypeScript config used for import resolution

option.name: --type-aware
tip: Enable rules that require type information

option.name: --type-check
tip: Enable experimental type checking (includes TypeScript compiler diagnostics)

option.name: --version
tip: U: -V, --version
Prints version information

option.name: --vitest-plugin
tip: Enable the Vitest plugin and detect test problems

option.name: --vue-plugin
tip: Enable the vue plugin and detect vue usage problems

option.name: --warn
tip: U: -W, --warn <NAME>
Deny the rule or category (emit a warning)

global_option.name: --help
tip: U: -h, --help
Prints help information
